governing_code: Pennsylvania Uniform Construction Code (34 Pa. Code Ch. 401-405 / Act 45) - 2021 I-Codes & PA Statutory Amendments

rules.description: Minimum corridor width for egress
Minimum clear width of egress doors
Minimum interior clear ceiling height
Maximum common path of egress travel distance (un-sprinklered B occupancy)
Minimum wheelchair turning clearance diameter in restrooms
Maximum stair riser height (Commercial)
Minimum stair tread depth (Commercial)
Minimum handrail height above tread nosing
Maximum handrail height above tread nosing
Business area occupant load factor (sq ft per person)
Minimum depth of working space in front of electrical panelboards (120/208V)
Minimum dedicated headroom clearance above electrical panels
GFCI protection required for commercial bathroom and sink receptacles
Maximum travel distance to fire extinguisher (Class A hazard)
Minimum emergency egress lighting illumination (foot-candles)
Maximum distance of manual fire alarm box from exit doorway
Minimum water closet fixture ratio for Business occupancy
Maximum hot water temperature delivered to public hand-washing lavatories
Minimum outdoor airflow rate per person for office space
Maximum slope ratio for pedestrian ramps
Minimum clear landing length at top and bottom of ramps
Minimum guardrail height above walking surfaces
Maximum opening size in guardrails (sphere test)
Minimum clearance below sprinkler head deflector to storage
Fire-resistance rating for corridors in un-sprinklered Group B
Grab bar mounting height above finished floor in restrooms
Type I exhaust hood requirement for commercial grease appliances
Continuous air barrier requirement across building envelope
Minimum freeze protection depth below grade for exterior supply lines
Maximum allowable dead-end corridor length in un-sprinklered B occupancy
Mounting height for door handles, locks, and latches
Maximum height of door thresholds
Minimum width for accessible parking stall
Exterior wall fire rating when fire separation distance is under 10 ft
Minimum continuous roof insulation R-value for Climate Zone 5
Maximum Solar Heat Gain Coefficient (SHGC) for fenestration in Zone 5
Maximum spacing between cleanouts on building drain/sewer line
Backflow prevention device required on commercial potable supply connection
Re-evaluation of life safety required for change of occupancy category
Minimum number of exit doors for rooms with occupant load > 49
Minimum separation distance between two exits (1/2 diagonal or 1/3 if sprinklered)
Egress doors shall swing in direction of exit travel for occupant load >= 50
Panic hardware required on exit doors for Group A or E with occupant load >= 50
Handrail extension required past top and bottom risers
Exit signs required above all primary exit doors
Minimum letter height for EXIT signs
Minimum aisle width serving employee areas
Minimum natural ventilation opening area (4% of floor area)
Minimum artificial light level in habitable rooms
Minimum room floor area for habitable spaces
Minimum horizontal dimension of habitable rooms
Minimum frost depth protection for footings in PA UCC Scranton region
Maximum forward reach height for operable controls
Minimum low reach height for operable controls
Minimum door maneuvering clearance at pull side of door
Water closet centerline distance from side wall in accessible restroom
Minimum knee clearance height under lavatory sink
Minimum width of electrical working space in front of panels
Arc-Fault Circuit-Interrupter (AFCI) protection required in dwelling areas
Maximum wall spacing distance between electrical receptacles
Maximum receptacle spacing along kitchen countertop surfaces
Maximum mounting height of overcurrent device center handle
Tamper-resistant receptacles required in specified child/dwelling areas
Minimum unobstructed width of fire apparatus access road
Minimum vertical clearance of fire apparatus access road
Minimum height of building address numbers visible from street
Maximum distance from fire hydrant to commercial building perimeter
Audible fire alarm signal level above average ambient sound level
Visual strobe light mounting height above finished floor
Sleeving or protection required for piping passing through foundation walls
Minimum clear distance from water closet center to side wall/partition
Minimum clear clearance in front of water closet to obstruction
Maximum flow rate for public lavatory faucets (GPM)
Maximum flush volume for commercial water closets (GPF)
Minimum termination distance of environmental exhaust from openable windows
Maximum allowable length of flexible air duct connections
Fire dampers required at duct penetrations of 1-hour fire resistance walls
Thermostat setback controls required for commercial HVAC systems
Occupancy sensor lighting controls required in office spaces
Maximum interior lighting power allowance (LPD) for Business occupancy
New materials in alterations must conform to modern building code
Accessibility compliance required for altered areas in existing buildings
Door latch releasing force shall not exceed 15 lbf
Locks on egress doors shall not require key/tool from egress side
Stairway on accessible means of egress must have min 48 inches clear width between handrails
Impact-resistant safety glazing required near doors and wet locations
Fireblocking required in concealed spaces of stud walls at ceiling/floor levels
Mandatory automatic fire sprinkler exemption for one- and two-family dwellings
Residential stairways allowable maximum riser 8.25 inches and minimum tread 9.0 inches
Lowest floor elevation in special flood hazard areas must be at or above Base Flood Elevation + 1 ft
Outdoor swimming pool enclosure barrier minimum height above grade
Pedestrian access gates in pool enclosures shall be self-closing and self-latching
Prohibition of fuel gas piping underground beneath building slabs without conduits
Minimum burial depth for underground exterior fuel gas piping
Sediment trap required on gas supply connection upstream of automatic controls
Arc-resistant or direct bonding required for Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST)
Temporary Certificate of Occupancy issuance permitted prior to full completion if safety is ensured
Evaluation required for historic or uncertified commercial structures seeking occupancy
Group E classification for educational facilities through 12th grade for >= 6 persons
Group I-2 classification for 24-hour medical care facility for > 5 persons
Allowable building height and area determined by occupancy and Type of Construction
Fire walls shall have structural stability to allow collapse of construction on either side without collapse of wall
Fire barrier ratings for shaft enclosures shall be min 1 hour for < 4 stories and 2 hours for >= 4 stories
Flame spread index class requirement for interior wall/ceiling finishes in exit enclosures
Group R occupancies shall be equipped with automatic sprinkler system throughout
Manual fire alarm system required in Group E occupancies with occupant load > 50
Ground snow loads determined for Pennsylvania regions (Scranton/NEPA min 35-40 PSF)
Basic ultimate design wind speed for Risk Category II structures in PA (110-115 MPH)
Establishment of flood hazard area maps by local municipal ordinance under PA UCC
At least one elevator shall be sized to accommodate 24-inch by 84-inch ambulance stretcher in open position
Anti-entrapment suction outlet covers complying with ANSI/APSP-16 required
Maximum allowable water turnover rate for public commercial swimming pools
Class A roof covering required for structures in designated PA WUI hazard zones
Spark arresters required on all chimney flues in designated WUI zones
Alternative engineering design validation required when deviating from prescriptive I-Codes
